svg.text: Metagenomically Assembled Genome Generation with Integrated Classification

g.text: Failed sample monitoring with probable reason(s).
Binette consensus refinement with CheckM2 quality assessment
Integrated downstream: geNomad + AMRFinderPlus + GTDB-Tk + CoverM
Automated reporting with MultiQC and consolidated TSV summaries
Strata-limited multi-sample binning (reduces N-squared alignment; Default: 15 samples per assembly)

svg.text: MAGGIC - Metagenomically Assembled Genome Generation with Integrated Classification
Built by Kranti Konganti using Nextflow with CPIPES Framework | HFP, FDA
